definitions: A set of protocols and tools provided by Groq, a company specializing in AI inference chips, that allows developers to interact with and integrate Groq's language models and other AI services into their own applications.
The interface through which software applications can communicate with Groq's high-performance language processing units (LPUs) to run AI models efficiently.
examples: Developers can use the Groq API to build fast AI-powered chatbots.
Integrating the Groq API into existing applications can significantly speed up AI inference.
The documentation for the Groq API is comprehensive and easy to follow.
